name: LLM agentic web crawling architectures
description: Research papers and repos on autonomous LLM agents that intelligently navigate, click, and crawl the web for deep research (2025-2026 methodologies).

name: ultra fast asynchronous data collection pipelines python
description: Innovative architectures for scaling web scraping to 10,000+ URLs concurrently with minimal memory usage and extreme speed.

name: semantic text extraction boilerplate removal algorithms
description: Advanced ML/heuristic algorithms (beyond basic Trafilatura/Readability) to perfectly extract pure article content and discard all noise, ads, and navbars.

name: search result quality year based filtering heuristics
description: Algorithms and heuristics to analyze if a web page or code repo is outdated vs evergreen, weighting freshness, maintenance, and actual relevance.

name: large scale unstructured data synthesis LLM
description: How to feed thousands of scraped URLs into LLMs (GraphRAG, long-context, MapReduce variants) to synthesize massive amounts of text into powerful insights.

name: dynamic topic routing query generation agent
description: How autonomous agents dynamically decide whether to search GitHub, arXiv, or specialized forums based on the real-time context of the research.

name: bypassing modern anti bot cloudflare web scraping
description: Innovative 2025/2026 security methods to evade advanced Cloudflare Turnstile, Datadome, and Akamai during massive ethical data collection.

name: autonomous multi agent research orchestration
description: Architectures where multiple specialized agents (searcher, reader, synthesizer, evaluator) parallelize deep web searches simultaneously.

name: RAG graph knowledge base generation from web
description: Automatically converting massive amounts of raw scraped web data into structured knowledge graphs for deep relationship analysis.

name: scalable PDF dossier generation automated reporting
description: Automated pipeline methods for rendering dense, highly formatted, semantic intelligence reports into beautiful PDFs programmatically.
